title: V12 Click-in 25.2V 3600mAh Replacement Battery for Dyson V12 Detect Slim, 965470-01, SV20, SV26, SV30, SV34, SV35, SV46 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
features: Compatible with Dyson V12 Detect Slim, SV20, SV34, SV35, SV46, SV26, SV30, Replace Part Number: 965470-01.
This replacement for Dyson V12 Detect Slim battery has the higher capacity of 3600mAh, increases your power tool's runtime by 2X, deliver over 75% more power.
Safety protection: Stable voltage, over-charge, over-discharge, over-heat, over-current & short-circuit protection.
description: Product Description: Battery Voltage: 25.2V Battery Capacity: 3.6Ah/3600mAh Battery Type: Lithium ion Replacement for original battery part number: 965470-01 Compatible with models: SV20, SV26, SV30, SV34, SV35, SV46 V12 Detect Slim V12 Detect Slim Fluffy V12 Detect Slim Absolute V12 Detect Slim Complete V12 Detect Slim Motorhead V12 Detect Slim Total Clean
